extensionDescription.message:
Thunderbird extension to manage todo.txt files: plain-text tasks, priorities, projects, contexts and due dates in a file you control.

Based on the original Todo.txt extension by Roy Kokkelkoren. Version 3.x is a full rewrite as a MailExtension for Thunderbird 140+ and is not backward compatible with v2.

• No extra add-ons: built-in file access for todo.txt and done.txt. After install, open Options → Browse to select your files.
• Popup: quick view from the toolbar; add, complete and edit tasks.
• Full tab view: filters, Today, Backlog, This week, sort by due date or priority.
• Options: file paths, behaviour, optional Calendar (Lightning) integration for tasks with due dates.
• Full Todo.txt syntax: priorities (A)(B)(C), projects +name, contexts @name, due:YYYY-MM-DD.

extensionSummary.message: Manage todo.txt from Thunderbird: tasks, priorities, projects and due dates in plain text.

options_showFullTitle.message: Show Projects and Contexts in the title

options_calendar_unavailable.message: Calendar API is not available. You can export tasks with due dates to an ICS file and import them manually in Thunderbird.

options_calendar_sync_no_due.message: No tasks with due date in todo.txt.

options_calendar_copy_log_hint.message: Copy full log (state, paths, sync) for debugging.

options_fsa_hint.message: Use Browse to select your todo.txt and done.txt files. No extra add-on required.

options_files_hint.message: Use Browse to choose your files. No extra add-on required.

welcome_text.message: Choose the todo.txt file where your tasks will be saved. We will use or create done.txt in the same folder.

welcome_select_error.message: Could not set up. Try again or use Browse in Options.

options_readOnly.message: Read-only mode (do not write to todo.txt/done.txt)

error_fileNotFound.message: Cannot read from file. Check that the file exists and the path is correct:

error_fileCannotWrite.message: Cannot write to file. Check that the file is not open elsewhere or locked:

error_filesNotSpecified.message: Set the paths to todo.txt and done.txt in Options (Browse).

error_readOnlyMode.message: Read-only mode is enabled. Disable it in Options to write to todo.txt/done.txt.

error_fileLocked.message: The file is in use or locked:

error_fileNetworkOrRemote.message: The file is on a network or remote location and cannot be accessed.

error_itemNotFound.message: Todo task cannot be found in todo.txt

error_eventEncountered.message: This calendar is used for Todo.txt and only accepts tasks, not events!

tab_empty_no_match.message: No tasks match the filters. Set Project, Context and Status to All to see everything, or add tasks.

tab_empty_no_config.message: No tasks. Open Options to choose your todo.txt file.

popup_empty_no_config.message: No tasks. Open Options to choose your todo.txt file.

popup_tab_tooltip.message: Open full view with filters and all tasks

options_displayLanguage_hint.message: Takes effect after reopening the popup/tab or reloading this page.

tab_toolbar_hint.message: Toolbar icon is visible in the Mail tab.

tab_syntax_line_created.message: YYYY-MM-DD creation date right after priority (optional).

tab_syntax_line_due.message: due:YYYY-MM-DD for due date (used by the calendar).

tab_syntax_line_completed.message: x YYYY-MM-DD at the start marks the task as completed.

tab_syntax_toggle_aria.message: Show or hide the todo.txt syntax help

tab_view_backlog_aria.message: View tasks with no due date
